namespace.patternError: namespace must consist of lower case alphanumeric characters or '-', and must start and end with an alphanumeric character (e.g. 'my-name',  or '123-abc', regex used for validation is ^[a-z0-9]([-a-z0-9]*[a-z0-9])?$

viewSpec.layoutDescription: Set a password for the Grafana admin. It must be at least 15 characters long and include a number, a lowercase letter, an uppercase letter, and one of these symbols: !@#$%^&*-
Specify how frequently targets should be scraped for metrics. Supported units: ms, s, m, h, d, w, y.
Specify retention duration for collected metrics. Supported units: ms, s, m, h, d, w, y.
Specify storage size for Prometheus metrics.

inputProps.description: Use the YAML editor to set application parameters. Parameters set in compose mode are not automatically applied to the application settings tab.

data.defaultValue:
grafana:
  service:
    annotations:
      nebius.com/MarketplaceServiceAccess: title=Grafana,ssl=false,type=web,port=service
  sidecar:
    image:
      registry: cr.eu-north1.nebius.cloud/e00vzg8t0148cc4zex
      repository: nebius/o11y/k8s-sidecar
      tag: "1.28.0"
    datasources:
      labelValue: ""
      enabled: true
      maxLines: 1000
      searchNamespace: ALL
    dashboards:
      enabled: true
      label: "grafana_dashboard"
      labelValue: 1
      searchNamespace: ALL

  dashboardProviders:
    dashboardproviders.yaml:
      apiVersion: 1
      providers:
        - name: node-exporter
          orgId: 1
          folder: "Node Exporter"
          type: file
          disableDeletion: false
          editable: true
          options:
            path: /var/lib/grafana/dashboards/node-exporter
        - name: gpu
          orgId: 1
          folder: "GPU"
          type: file
          disableDeletion: false
          editable: true
          options:
            path: /var/lib/grafana/dashboards/gpu
        - name: loki
          orgId: 1
          folder: 'Loki'
          type: file
          disableDeletion: false
          editable: true
          options:
            path: /var/lib/grafana/dashboards/loki

  dashboards:
    node-exporter:
      node-exporter:
        gnetId: 1860
        revision: 37
        datasource: Prometheus
      kubernetes-node-exporter:
        gnetId: 8171
        datasource: Prometheus
    gpu:
      dcgm-exporter:
        url: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/NVIDIA/dcgm-exporter/main/grafana/dcgm-exporter-dashboard.json
        datasource: Prometheus
    loki:
      loki-logs:
        gnetId: 15141
        datasource: Loki
  datasources:
    datasources.yaml:
      apiVersion: 1
      datasources:
        - name: Prometheus
          type: prometheus
          uid: prometheus
          url: http://prometheus-server
          access: proxy
          isDefault: false
          version: 1

  image:
    registry: cr.eu-north1.nebius.cloud/e00vzg8t0148cc4zex
    repository: nebius/o11y/grafana
    tag: "11.4.0"

  testFramework:
    image:
      registry: cr.eu-north1.nebius.cloud/e00vzg8t0148cc4zex
      repository: nebius/o11y/bats
      tag: "v1.4.1"

  downloadDashboardsImage:
    registry: cr.eu-north1.nebius.cloud/e00vzg8t0148cc4zex
    repository: nebius/o11y/curl
    tag: "7.85.0"

  initChownData:
    image:
      registry: cr.eu-north1.nebius.cloud/e00vzg8t0148cc4zex
      repository: nebius/o11y/busybox
      tag: "1.31.1"

  imageRenderer:
    image:
      registry: cr.eu-north1.nebius.cloud/e00vzg8t0148cc4zex
      repository: nebius/o11y/grafana-image-renderer
      tag: latest_pinned

prometheus:
  extraScrapeConfigs: |
    - job_name: cilium-agent
      kubernetes_sd_configs:
      - role: pod
        namespaces:
          names:
          - kube-system
      relabel_configs:
      - source_labels: [__meta_kubernetes_pod_annotation_prometheus_io_scrape]
        regex: true
        action: keep
      - source_labels: [__meta_kubernetes_pod_annotation_prometheus_io_port]
        regex: 9962
        action: keep
      - source_labels: [__meta_kubernetes_pod_container_port_number]
        regex: .*
        action: keep
      - source_labels: [__meta_kubernetes_pod_container_port_number]
        regex: ""
        action: drop
      - target_label: k8s_app
        replacement: cilium
      - source_labels: [__address__, __meta_kubernetes_pod_annotation_prometheus_io_port]
        regex: (.+):\d+;(\d+)
        replacement: ${1}:${2}
        target_label: __address__
      - source_labels: [__meta_kubernetes_namespace]
        target_label: namespace
      - source_labels: [__meta_kubernetes_pod_name]
        target_label: pod
      - source_labels: [__meta_kubernetes_pod_node_name]
        target_label: node
      metrics_path: /metrics
      scheme: http
      honor_labels: true
      scrape_interval: 10s
    - job_name: 'hubble'
      kubernetes_sd_configs:
      - role: endpoints
        namespaces:
          names:
          - kube-system
      relabel_configs:
      - source_labels: [__meta_kubernetes_service_label_k8s_app]
        regex: hubble
        action: keep
      - source_labels: [__meta_kubernetes_endpoint_port_name]
        regex: hubble-metrics
        action: keep
      - source_labels: [__meta_kubernetes_pod_node_name]
        regex: (.+)
        replacement: ${1}
        target_label: node
      - source_labels: [__meta_kubernetes_service_name]
        target_label: service
      - source_labels: [__meta_kubernetes_namespace]
        target_label: namespace
      metrics_path: /metrics
      scheme: http
      honor_labels: true
      scrape_interval: 10s
    - job_name: 'servicemonitors'
      kubernetes_sd_configs:
        - role: endpoints
      relabel_configs:
        # Relabel for all ServiceMonitor-compatible services
        - source_labels: [__meta_kubernetes_service_annotation_prometheus_io_scrape]
          action: keep
          regex: true
        # Exclude specific services in kube-system namespace
        - source_labels: [__meta_kubernetes_namespace, __meta_kubernetes_service_name]
          action: drop
          regex: kube-system;(cilium-agent|hubble-metrics|hubble-peer|hubble-relay|hubble-ui)
        # Add namespace metadata to metrics
        - source_labels: [__meta_kubernetes_namespace]
          target_label: namespace
        # Add service metadata to metrics
        - source_labels: [__meta_kubernetes_service_name]
          target_label: service

  alertmanager:
    enabled: false
    image:
      repository: 'cr.eu-north1.nebius.cloud/marketplace/nebius/elijah-k-o11y/image/alertmanager'
      tag: v0.27.0
    configmapReload:
      image:
        repository: 'cr.eu-north1.nebius.cloud/marketplace/nebius/elijah-k-o11y/image/prometheus-config-reloader'
        tag: v0.66.0

  kube-state-metrics:
    metricLabelsAllowlist:
      - nodes=[nebius.com/group-name]
    image:
      registry: 'cr.eu-north1.nebius.cloud/marketplace'
      repository: nebius/elijah-k-o11y/image/kube-state-metrics
      tag: v2.14.0
    kubeRBACProxy:
      image:
        registry: 'cr.eu-north1.nebius.cloud/marketplace'
        repository: nebius/elijah-k-o11y/image/kube-rbac-proxy
        tag: v0.18.2

  prometheus-node-exporter:
    enabled: true
    image:
      registry: 'cr.eu-north1.nebius.cloud/marketplace'
      repository: nebius/elijah-k-o11y/image/node-exporter
      tag: v1.8.2
    kubeRBACProxy:
      image:
        registry: 'cr.eu-north1.nebius.cloud/marketplace'
        repository: nebius/elijah-k-o11y/image/kube-rbac-proxy
        tag: v0.18.2

  prometheus-pushgateway:
    enabled: false
    image:
      repository: 'cr.eu-north1.nebius.cloud/marketplace/nebius/elijah-k-o11y/image/pushgateway'
      tag: v1.10.0
  configmapReload:
    prometheus:
      image:
        repository: 'cr.eu-north1.nebius.cloud/marketplace/nebius/elijah-k-o11y/image/prometheus-config-reloader'
        tag: v0.78.2
  server:
    fullnameOverride: prometheus-server
    securityContext:
      fsGroup: 65534
      runAsGroup: 0
      runAsNonRoot: false
      runAsUser: 0
    image:
      repository: 'cr.eu-north1.nebius.cloud/marketplace/nebius/elijah-k-o11y/image/prometheus'
      tag: v3.1.0
